title: Tetrazygiopsis brachycentra

taxonomy: Tetrazygiopsis brachycentra is classified as a member of the family Tetrazygiaceae, an order of mosses known as Dicranales, in the class Bryopsida, division Bryophyta. This classification places it within the larger group of bryophytes, which are non-vascular plants. The family Tetrazygiaceae is characterized by its distinctive leaf morphology and the presence of a large, central costa. Tetrazygiopsis brachycentra's classification reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other mosses. Further research may be needed to fully understand the taxonomy of this species.
